name:
Integration tests for event listener annotations in snapshots.

   Tests that elements with JS event handlers (onclick, React props, etc.)
   are detected and annotated with [on:click] etc. in the snapshot tree. > inline onclick handler detection > detects onclick handler and annotates with [on:click]
